base.prompt: A photographic, candid, head-and-shoulders portrait of a fictional woman in their fifties, of Northern European descent, with wavy auburn hair and deep dark eyes, a thoughtful look. natural light from a side window. a softly blurred neutral indoor background. Realistic skin texture, natural pores, no makeup, no glasses, no jewelry, no text, no watermark, sharp focus on the face. This is a fictional character — do not generate a real or named person.

lookalikes.prompt: A woman in her 40s, fair skin, subtle fine lines, a softer, heart-shaped face with a delicate jawline. Her hair is medium-length, wavy, deep auburn with subtle highlights near the crown, casually framing her face. Her eyes are a striking hazel, rounder and closer set, and her full, naturally arched eyebrows define her gaze. Her nose has a slightly upturned bridge and a more pointed tip. Her lips are full and pillowy, with a less defined cupid's bow. She has a faint beauty mark above her left eyebrow. Her expression is contemplative and calm, her head slightly tilted to the right and angled downwards. She leans casually against a weathered red brick wall in a quiet alley, wearing comfortable, simple clothes. Three-quarter body shot, face clearly visible. Photographic, sharp focus, realistic skin texture.
